posts.title: How Many Warehouse Robots Are Actually Working in 2026? Amazon, Symbotic, and Locus Numbers
posts.metaDescription: Amazon operates 1M+ warehouse robots. Symbotic has a $5B backlog. Locus hit 7B picks. Real deployment numbers and productivity data from 2026.

posts.title: Why $499/mo AI Sales Tools Are Wrong for Solo Outside Reps in 2026
posts.metaDescription: ZoomInfo costs $15K+/year. Agent Frank is $499/mo. Apollo runs $96/mo. The honest truth about which AI sales tools work for solo outside reps — and which are billing for capabilities you do not need.
